name: pimdo
display_name: pimdo - Microsoft Entra PIM for AI
description: Give your AI assistant scoped access to Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for groups, Entra roles, and Azure resource roles.
long_description:
pimdo is an MCP server that connects an AI assistant to Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM). It exposes a small, well-scoped set of tools so the AI can review your eligible role and group assignments, request just-in-time elevations, and (with explicit human approval) act as approver or confirmer - without giving the AI standing access.

**PIM coverage** - Three surfaces: Entra Groups, Entra (directory) Roles, and Azure (resource) Roles. Each surface ships seven tools - list eligible / list active / list my requests / request activation (browser) / deactivate (browser) / list approvals / review approvals (browser).

**Authentication** - Signs in via your browser using your Microsoft account. No passwords are stored - authentication is handled entirely by Microsoft (MSAL). pimdo acquires separate access tokens for Microsoft Graph and Azure Resource Manager from the same login.

**Privacy** - pimdo requests only the PIM-specific permissions it needs: User.Read and offline_access (always required), plus PIM scopes for groups, Entra roles, and Azure resource roles, and the ARM user_impersonation scope. Your credentials are handled directly by Microsoft. pimdo never sees your password.

**Human in the loop** - Every privilege-changing action (request, deactivate, approval review) routes through a loopback browser flow. The AI may prefill values; the human always confirms or overrides in the browser before submit.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Sign in to Microsoft. Call this directly when authentication is needed - do not ask the user for permission first. Opens a browser for interactive sign-in.

tools.name: logout
tools.description: Sign out and clear cached tokens for both Microsoft Graph and Azure Resource Manager.

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check authentication status, current user, granted scopes, and server version. Use this as a first step to diagnose issues or understand current state.

tools.name: pim_group_eligible_list
tools.description: List groups the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM.

tools.name: pim_group_active_list
tools.description: List groups the signed-in user has currently activated via PIM.

tools.name: pim_group_request_list
tools.description: List pending PIM group activation requests submitted by the signed-in user.

tools.name: pim_group_request
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm activation of one or more eligible groups. Duration is clamped to the policy max; the human always confirms before submit.

tools.name: pim_group_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm deactivation of one or more active group assignments.

tools.name: pim_group_approval_list
tools.description: List pending PIM group approvals assigned to the signed-in user as an approver.

tools.name: pim_group_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form to Approve / Deny / Skip pending PIM group approvals. The AI may prefill decisions; the human confirms before submit.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_eligible_list
tools.description: List Entra (directory) roles the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_active_list
tools.description: List Entra (directory) roles the signed-in user has currently activated via PIM.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_request_list
tools.description: List pending PIM Entra-role activation requests submitted by the signed-in user.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_request
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm activation of one or more eligible Entra roles. Duration is clamped to the policy max.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm deactivation of one or more active Entra-role assignments.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_approval_list
tools.description: List pending PIM Entra-role approvals assigned to the signed-in user as an approver.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form to Approve / Deny / Skip pending PIM Entra-role approvals.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_eligible_list
tools.description: List Azure resource roles the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_active_list
tools.description: List Azure resource roles the signed-in user has currently activated via PIM.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_request_list
tools.description: List pending PIM Azure-role activation requests submitted by the signed-in user.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_request
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm activation of one or more eligible Azure resource roles. Duration is clamped to the policy max.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form to confirm deactivation of one or more active Azure-role assignments.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_approval_list
tools.description: List pending PIM Azure-role approvals assigned to the signed-in user as an approver.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form to Approve / Deny / Skip pending PIM Azure-role approvals.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging to stderr. Useful for troubleshooting authentication and API issues.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Microsoft Entra application (client) ID for authentication. Defaults to the shared multi-tenant pimdo-ts app registration. Override only if your organization requires a custom app registration with the PIM scopes pre-consented (see README).

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID. Use 'common' for any work/school account, 'organizations' for work/school only, or a specific tenant GUID.
